2605.01338.title: DiagramNet: An End-to-End Recognition Framework and Dataset for Non-Standard System-Level Diagrams
2605.01338.paper_summary: System-level diagrams encode the architectural blueprint of chip design, specifying module functions, dataflows, and interface protocols. However, non-standardized symbols and the scarcity of structured training data hinder existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) from recognizing these diagrams. To address this gap, we introduce DiagramNet, the first multimodal dataset for system-level diagrams, comprising 10,977 connection annotations and 15,515 chain-of-thought QA pairs across four tasks: Listing, Localization, Connection, and Circuit QA. Building on this dataset, we propose a progressive training pipeline together with a decoupled multi-agent workflow that decomposes complex visual reasoning into Perception, Reasoning, and Knowledge stages. On the DiagramNet benchmark, integrating our 3B-parameter model with the proposed workflow surpasses the 2025 EDA Elite Challenge winner and outperforms GPT-5, Claude-Sonnet-4, and Gemini-2.5-Pro by over 2x in end-to-end evaluation. Notably, the workflow generalizes beyond our model, boosting Task 1 performance by 128.7x for Gemini-2.5-Pro and 12.4x for GPT-5. Furthermore, with only 60 images for detector adaptation, the method transfers effectively to AMSBench, achieving zero-shot connectivity reasoning on par with GPT-5 and Claude-Sonnet-4 while surpassing the AMS state-of-the-art method Netlistify.
2605.01338.paper_summary_zh: 系統級圖表編碼了晶片設計的架構藍圖，指定模組功能、數據流和介面協議。然而，非標準化的符號和結構化訓練數據的稀缺阻礙了現有的多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）識別這些圖表。為了解決這一問題，我們推出了DiagramNet，這是首個針對系統級圖表的多模態數據集，包含10,977個連接註釋和15,515個思考鏈問答對，涵蓋四個任務：列舉、定位、連接和電路問答。基於這個數據集，我們提出了一個漸進式訓練管道，以及一個解耦的多代理工作流程，將複雜的視覺推理分解為感知、推理和知識階段。在DiagramNet基準測試中，將我們的3B參數模型與所提出的工作流程整合，超越了2025 EDA精英挑戰賽的獲勝者，並在端到端評估中超過了GPT-5、Claude-Sonnet-4和Gemini-2.5-Pro超過2倍。值得注意的是，該工作流程超越了我們的模型，將Gemini-2.5-Pro的任務1性能提升了128.7倍，GPT-5的性能提升了12.4倍。此外，僅用60張圖像進行檢測器適應，該方法有效地轉移到AMSBench，在零樣本連接推理上達到了與GPT-5和Claude-Sonnet-4相當的水平，同時超越了AMS最先進的方法Netlistify。
2605.01338.author: Jincheng Lou et.al.
2605.01338.authors: Jincheng Lou, Ruohan Xu, Jiapeng Li, Junyin Pi, Runzhe Tao, Weijian Fan, Xiao Tan, Guojie Luo, Yibo Lin
